title: HNTB Leader Earns St. Ignatius Alumni Award
summary_en: Pat Mosher, ’04 EMBA, was honored April 9 with the St. Ignatius Alumni Award by Rockhurst University in a ceremony honoring her 30-year career with HNTB in Kansas City, Missouri.
title_cn: [待翻译] HNTB Leader Earns St. Ignatius Alumni Award
